goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should 'leave after 09:30' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food and should be in the 'south'.
The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on tuesday
The train should leave after 09:30 and should depart from london liverpool street
Make sure you get arrival time, train ID, and travel time
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the south
The restaurant should be in the cheap price range
Make sure you get phone number
